steps.title: Identify corresponding angles
steps.content: Line $n$ is a transversal crossing parallel lines $r$ and $s$. The angle marked $162^\circ$ and the angle marked $x^\circ$ are in corresponding positions.

steps.title: Use the parallel-line relationship
steps.content:
Corresponding angles formed by a transversal across parallel lines are congruent.
$$x=162$$
The answer is 162.
